title: Onboarding Protocol
subTitle: Following the inquiry via Whatsapp or Email, the following procedure for onboarding of educational therapy will take place:

starterKit.name: Profiling exercise
features: Establishment of startpoint and tailored teaching strategy

professionalToolbox.name: Educational Therapy
features: Actual therapy fees vary by learning stage
One month's fees deposit payable upfront, refundable when T&Cs are met
